note: CoW Protocol on-chain order pre-signature. GPv2Settlement.setPreSignature(bytes orderUid, bool signed), selector 0xec6cb13f, mainnet 0x9008d19f58aabd9ed0d60971565aa8510560ab41. This is the smart-contract-wallet (e.g. Safe) order-placement path: an EOA signs the EIP-712 Order off-chain (-> cowswap/order/sign), while a contract wallet authorises the SAME order on-chain by marking its orderUid pre-signed. signed=true sets PRE_SIGNED (the order becomes tradable / commit); signed=false unsets it (revoke / cancel). -> amm pre_sign_intent_order (venue=cow_swap). order_hash carries the full opaque orderUid (56B: 32B orderDigest + 20B owner + 4B validTo via GPv2Order.packOrderUidParams); the order's economic terms (sell/buy/amounts) live in the off-chain order keyed by the digest and are NOT statically decodable from this calldata (CoW orderbook API is the enrichment source). 1st-party: github.com/cowprotocol/contracts src/contracts/mixins/GPv2Signing.sol::setPreSignature, src/contracts/libraries/GPv2Order.sol::packOrderUidParams.
